title: Spanish Masarepa Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish made with masarepa, rich and creamy flavors. Perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the tomato and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the artichoke hearts, masarepa, and peas. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Uncover and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
